analysis.reasoning: Core message: An EU representative thanks Pakistan’s foreign minister for hosting EU ambassadors, highlights that EU–Pakistan cooperation is increasing and mutually beneficial, and looks forward to closer collaboration. The quoted text in Urdu reports the lunch with 18 ambassadors and congratulations to newly appointed ones. Evaluation: EU1 (EU is a successful story) – Not promoted; no reference to EU history, overcoming obstacles, or lessons learned. EU2 (EU is united) – Not promoted; no mention of EU internal unity or solidarity among member states. EU3 (EU useful for its citizens) – Not applicable; the tweet concerns external cooperation with Pakistan, not policies benefiting EU citizens domestically. EU4 (EU avant-garde) – Not promoted; no claim about pioneering regulation or leadership on issues. EU5 (EU champion of fair causes) – Not promoted; no reference to human rights or defending fair causes. EU6 (EU contributes to a better world) – Promoted; the tweet frames EU–Pakistan cooperation as increasing, mutually beneficial, and anticipates closer collaboration, which aligns with the EU as a contributor to global cooperation and development. Conclusion: Only EU6 applies.
